completed_tasks.name: Audit UI components and implement stable `elem_id` attributes

Implement robust accordion and tab handling logic
Implement bulletproof port isolation (Port 8765 + setup teardown)
Fix log-capturing robustness in regression tests (using reloads)
Enable debug_mode for E2E in Mock App

remaining_tasks.name: Achieve 100% pass rate on final verification suite (Fix hidden Export slider)

blockers.description: The 'dedup_thresh_input' slider is hidden which fails visibility checks; need to click its parent accordion first.
blockers.workaround: Click 'Deduplication' accordion on the Export tab.

decisions.rationale: Label-based tests are too fragile for rapid UI iteration.
Prevent collisions with other local Gradio instances on 7860.
Captured logger mocks were failing due to early binding; reload ensures fresh mocks.

next_action: Apply the 'Deduplication' accordion click fix to `tests/ui/test_component_verification.py` and run the final pytest sweep.
context_notes: We are very close. Coverage is over 80%. All unit tests pass except for the final regression check which was just fixed by the reload pattern. Only one UI slider visibility failure remains.
